short: A later DeepSeek model offering strong reasoning and coding at low cost.
definition: DeepSeek V4 is a later generation in DeepSeek's model line, designed to deliver strong reasoning and coding at a low cost per token relative to many proprietary systems. For efficiency it activates only a few of its many specialized sub-networks per request (a mixture-of-experts design), and it targets tasks that involve very long inputs. Like earlier DeepSeek releases, it continues the company's emphasis on efficient training and use.
